response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of broad full-stack experience and some genuine developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium course, CI setup, MCP code generators). However, the role is a Level II Engineering Manager and the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no direct-report leadership, and no organizational-change leadership. Mobile-platform exposure is also limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint years ago. The candidate appears to be a senior IC rather than an engineering manager and does not meet the 2-year people management minimum.
strengths: Deep, long-tenured engineering background with relevant testing/tooling projects (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium curriculum)
Hands-on developer tooling experience (CI/CD setup, GitLab admin, MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Polyglot full-stack engineer comfortable picking the right tool, useful for guiding system design and code review
concerns: No demonstrated people-management or direct-report leadership experience (misses 2-year minimum)
Lacks evidence of leading organizational change or setting team-level roadmaps and performance expectations
Minimal mobile-platform ecosystem depth; brief iOS/Apple TV work from 2015–2016 only

key_factors.factor: Relevant developer tools & testing infrastructure background
